mechanics.excerpt: few worlds changed hands, but tne balance power remained the same; Aside trom skirmish in 3041 in which the Tenth Lyran Guards took the world of Skondia from the Combine_ the states of the Inner Sphere seemed content rebuild their realms peace, Military readiness and overcharged rhetoric still ruled the day; but Successor States had- least temporarily grown tired of war.
